query:
CREATE TABLE `carbon_api_cache` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`cacheKey` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`totalServices` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`rawJson` mediumtext NOT NULL,
	`fetchedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`ttlHours` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 6,
	`lastSyncedServicesCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`lastSyncedAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `carbon_api_cache_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `carbon_api_cache_cacheKey_unique` UNIQUE(`cacheKey`)
);

	`lastSyncedAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
